---
title: "Nimo Joseph"
image: IMG-20260424-WA0012.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

My name is Joseph Nimo. I’m an Accounting student, a teacher, and a creative driven by impact. For the past few years, I’ve been working in education, helping young people understand concepts in a practical and meaningful way.

Beyond teaching, I’m deeply involved in research and communication. I analyze business and economic issues and break them down into simple insights people can actually use in their daily lives.

I’m also an aspiring filmmaker and writer, focused on telling authentic African stories and building something original within the Ghanaian film space.

At the heart of everything I do is a bigger vision—The economy of value—a project aimed at helping individuals and communities better understand value, money, and how to grow both.

For me, it’s all about impact, growth, and creating something that truly matters.
